This attonrey cares so much about his friends in the court system that if you are his client he will leave you to hang. He works to clear your name not at all. He will do a half A Job and you will be wondering why you spent money on his services. His advice will always be, take the plea even if you are innocent.
My husband has talked highly of Larry Meyers and highly recommends his attorney services for criminal cases
I have already left a review about the greatness Larry is!
Amazing food hands down
Normally "Honest Attorney" is more of an oxymoron than not but, in Larry's case, it's a totally true thing. You'll love this guy!

I’m honestly not sure how this firm has all 5-star reviews unless those experiences were very different from mine.

I initially contacted them to have an attorney review and send a demand letter to an insurance company that has been lowballing us and dragging the process out for nearly five months. I had already written the demand letter myself and simply wanted it reviewed, adjusted if necessary, and sent on attorney letterhead to add weight. I was quoted $150 to $250 for this service once they found an attorney who would be a good fit.

The next day, I received a call saying they had located an attorney, but the fee would now be $350. I told them I would get back to them as I was waiting on return calls from other attorneys.

When I called back the following day, I spoke with Katy, who was very polite and helpful. She mentioned she had caught Molina on her way out and that Molina would send the necessary documents for me to sign the next day.

By the end of the following day, I still had not received anything, so I called again. After being on hold for several minutes, Molina came to the phone and told me the attorney had taken on several new cases in the last few hours and would not be able to review my documents for several weeks. She then asked if that would be acceptable.

It was not.

I understand that attorneys’ time is valuable, but so is mine. The shifting pricing and last-minute delay felt unprofessional and resulted in wasted time on my end. Based on this experience, I chose to go elsewhere.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Thank you for taking the time to share your feedback. We are sorry to hear that your experience while calling and inquiring about legal services did not meet your expectations. Your detailed description is helpful and allows us to continue improving.

We would like to clarify that you were not a retained client of our firm. The initial estimate you received over the phone was an approximate quote based on limited information. After reviewing the scope and urgency of your request, the pricing was adjusted to reflect the level of attorney involvement required. We understand how this could be frustrating, and we apologize for any confusion this may have caused.

As a matter of ethical practice, our attorneys cannot issue or sign a demand letter without conducting their own review of the facts and documentation. This ensures accuracy, compliance, and protection for all parties involved.

We sincerely apologize that your experience was not a positive one. Based on your feedback, we recognize there are areas where we can improve, and we will work to do so. We wish you the very best moving forward.

Jeff and his staff were able to quickly review my father-in-law's small will and found mistakes that would have put us into a formal probate on his passing. Due to a concussion and his age (99) we were concerned about how much longer he would live and wanted things fixed quickly. Not only was Jeff and his staff able to put an updated will together, but they were able to transfer additional property into his trust that had been missed by another lawyer.
Jeff explained every aspect of the new trust and will to my father-in-law and his daughter, who had concerns, and answered all their questions clearly and succinctly. He also explained the responsibilities the alternate trustee would have to complete. It was all done in record time.
Jeff was referred to us by another estate attorney in Utah County, which shows the respect his firm has even outside Washington County.

reviews.text: I unfortunately had to employ a lawyer for a small claims case. I was paired up with Zachary Snipe. He prepared my case to the best of his ability. In the end he presented my side better than I could hope. I found him to be very knowledgeable in building a sound and convincing side to my case. I would highly recommend this firm and especially Zachary.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for sharing your experience with Zachary Snipe at Barney McKenna & Olmstead PC. We are overjoyed to hear about the positive outcome of your small claims case.

reviews.text: I reached out to 3 local law firms in town and BMO was the only one to respond to me. I am glad they did. I did not have a big case but they took it on anyway. We had a great experience with Zach. He would walk us through the process and not leave us in the dark. Always was prompt with responding to questions. He won our case! He locked things down for us to help ensure guarantees were coming our way. It was amazing. We had a great experience but hope to not have to do that again!
reviews.ownerResponse: We're overjoyed to hear about your positive experience with Zach Snipe! Thank you for sharing your feedback. We greatly appreciate it!

reviews.text:
Very good experience. They had our back all the way. Thanks for being things settled.
Linda
reviews.ownerResponse: We're delighted to hear about your positive experience with us, Linda. Thank you for sharing your feedback.

reviews.text:
Mr Snipe was amazing! He is a very good litigator and did a great job for us.We were happy with the outcome.

Thanks so much!!
Bruce and Rhonda
Hlebasko
reviews.ownerResponse: Thanks for the positive feedback! We are thrilled to hear that Mr. Snipe did an amazing job for you. Your satisfaction is our priority.

reviews.text: They are a very professional law firm. Zach was my attorney and he was great! He was very detailed and explained things to me so I understood everything I needed to know.  I would Highly recommend them for your needs.
reviews.ownerResponse: We're honored to have provided you with great service. Thank you for recommending us!

reviews.text: We had a great experience having our Trust and Will done by Mr. McKenna. He was extremely thorough with the process and answered every little and big question we had to ensure our wishes were all made clear in our legal documents. We feel relieved to have finally worked on this important step for our young family. In fact, our fourth child was born the evening we signed our Trust documents! A fun day to remember!
reviews.ownerResponse: We genuinely admire your positive experience with Mr. McKenna. Congratulations on your new addition to the family!

reviews.text: great personal service, A great feeling knowing everything I worked hard for will be the future for my loved ones.
reviews.ownerResponse: We are ecstatic to hear about your great personal service experience with us. Thank you for sharing your feedback!

reviews.text: Joseph Prete is that rarely-found attorney that is passionate about serving his clients without pressure. He offers my clients a complimentary estate planning class so they can ask specific questions regarding their needs for an estate plan. If you are considering setting up a trust to protect your family's assets, I strongly recommend starting with Joseph first!
reviews.ownerResponse: We are privileged to receive your wonderful feedback. Thank you for recommending Joseph Prete for estate planning needs.

reviews.text: Our parents trusted Barney McKenna and Olmstead to set up their family trust in their later years, and we have had nothing but excellent service from them as we asked them to aid us in updating all the documentation associated with caring for aging parents (POAs, Trust documents, Health directives, etc.).  Jeff McKenna was responsive and informative, and we never had to hound him for answers.  The office staff was also highly competent and responsive to the many questions that we had as we helped our parents to navigate their golden years.  We also used Barney McKenna and Olmstead to help us sell their home so that they would have the necessary income to finance their eventual move into assisted living.  Special thanks to Preston Matthews who served as our attorney in the home transfer.  We could not be happier with the outcome of our experience with them.
reviews.ownerResponse: We're thrilled to hear about your positive experience. Your feedback is incredibly valuable to us. Thank you for sharing your experience.

reviews.text: Joseph Prete is amazing. Finding someone to trust in the legal field is hard enough, but Joseph is one of those people.  Go see him and you won't regret it!!
reviews.ownerResponse: We are delighted to hear about your positive experience with Joseph Prete. Thank you for sharing your feedback!

reviews.text: Jeff McKenna helped my parents plan their estate.  They both said what an incredible attorney, and man, he was.  After my parents passed, and I had to deal with their estate and Trust, Jeff was like a God send to me.  He literally treated me like family and was always so incredible and kind.  I can't recommend him enough--he is simply the best!
reviews.ownerResponse: Thanks for sharing your experience with Jeff McKenna. We genuinely admire your kind words and are glad to hear he was able to assist you and your parents with their estate planning needs.

reviews.text: Jeff was very courteous and professional. I would recommend him to anyone looking for an attorney.
reviews.ownerResponse: We genuinely admire your kind words about Jeff. Thank you for sharing your experience with us.

reviews.text: Professional and personal.
I appreciate the advice and  help keeping my trust current. Spending time discussing the impact of changes was helpful and appreciated.
reviews.ownerResponse: We're honored to have been able to assist you with keeping your trust current. Thank you for sharing your experience with us.

reviews.text:
I scheduled a phone consultation with this attorney hoping to get guidance on a difficult situation. While we briefly discussed the basics of my case, the majority of the call was focused on his fees and how much he would charge. Immediately after the call, he sent me a Venmo request for $150 for the consult, which I paid because I believed I’d be receiving follow-up help or at least a response to my questions.

Unfortunately, after I paid, he stopped responding entirely. I reached out again for clarification and assistance and never heard back. It felt like I paid $150 for nothing. This was disappointing and unprofessional, and I would not recommend this experience to others.

Update: After almost of two months with no response I got the screenshots attached. No, he did not refund the money, it was very strange. See images.

Cares about making sure that kids are protected and proceedings are fair. Most of all is a real advocate and does a beautiful job advocating for his clients wellness and mental health, while doing his job to actually protect and fight for his clients in the court.
